task_description: Phase 24: QuantDrive - Google Drive Killer with E2E encryption. Create apps/quantdrive/ with file CRUD (encrypted), folder tree management, sharing with key exchange, 30-day version history, 30-day soft-delete trash, storage quota tiers (15GB free, 100GB/$1.99, 2TB/$9.99), and AI-powered features (auto-organize, duplicate detection, content search, file summarization, data extraction from receipts/invoices).

verification.summary: All 89 tests pass across 11 test files. TypeScript strict mode compiles cleanly. Tests exercise real crypto round-trips, quota enforcement, version history with encryption key, trash retention, AI categorization via content hashes, sharing key exchange with ownership verification, folder cascade path updates, and comprehensive error handling. Semantic review v2: APPROVED.
